CODING_SOFTWARE.description: Programming, software engineering, repositories, systems, scripts, and developer tooling.

MATHEMATICS.description: Mathematical problem solving, formal proof, symbolic manipulation, geometry, algebra, and quantitative derivation.

SCIENCE.description: Natural and physical sciences, scientific explanations, experiments, mechanisms, and evidence-based reasoning.

MEDICINE_HEALTH.description: Medicine, health, clinical reasoning, physiology, diagnosis, treatment, and biomedical content.

DATA_ANALYSIS.description: Statistics, data interpretation, spreadsheets, charts, datasets, metrics, and empirical analysis.

HUMANITIES.description: History, literature, philosophy, religion, culture, art analysis, and interpretive scholarship.

WRITING.description: Composition, prose quality, rhetoric, narrative, essays, editing, tone, style, and communication craft.

SOCIAL_SCIENCE.description: Economics, psychology, sociology, politics, education, law-adjacent reasoning, and social systems.

BUSINESS_OPERATIONS.description: Business, product, finance-adjacent analysis, operations, marketing, sales, and organizational work.

GENERAL_KNOWLEDGE.description: Broad non-specialized factual, instructional, conversational, or mixed-domain tasks.

notes: Domains describe subject matter; capabilities describe behavior.
Specialist datasets may be built from domain+capability intersections.
